subcodes.first_line: O thou who art exhilarated by the sweet-scented breeze of God's bounty, I address thee from this most exalted spot with a heart overflowing with the love of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها المترنح من نسیم موهبه الله انی اخاطبک من هذه البقعه العلیا بقلب طافح بمحبه الله
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @effort; striving
